definitions: Substances or factors that increase or improve the quality, value, or extent of something.
In genetics, a short region of DNA that can be bound by proteins (activators) to increase the likelihood that transcription of a particular gene will occur.
In cooking, ingredients added to food to improve its flavor, color, or texture.
examples: Flavor enhancers are common in processed foods.
Genetic enhancers play a crucial role in gene expression.
The new software includes several performance enhancers.
